content: Quick fix: Signal Journal click-to-load + filter + bulk delete
Phase 3: Auto-Optimizer (Optuna TPE + Grid + CMA-ES + walk-forward + heatmap + importance + robustness + apply-as-preset) - frontend 100%, backend 92.3%, sklearn installed
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + OPTIONS BACKTEST (weekly expiry, paired INDEX+OPTION legs, real expired-option candles, OI/IV/theta tracking)
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
Phase 7: Local Deployment Package (Docker Compose + Windows .bat + LOCAL_SETUP_GUIDE.md)
